# Enrollment Requirements Quality Checklist: Student Course Enrollment

**Purpose**: Validate whether enrollment requirements are complete, clear, consistent, measurable, and scenario-complete before implementation/review sign-off.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: [/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-class-enrollment/spec.md](/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-class-enrollment/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are enrollment initiation requirements fully specified for student self-service actors and excluded actors? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK002 Are eligibility requirement definitions complete for holds, prerequisites, schedule conflicts, and capacity with no missing rule class? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Are post-success outcome requirements complete for both schedule updates and fee-change communication timing expectations? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK004 Are all blocked-enrollment reason content requirements defined at the same level of detail across prerequisite, capacity, hold, and conflict cases? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, §FR-005, §FR-006, §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK005 Are explicit requirements present for duplicate-attempt handling and race conditions referenced in edge cases, not only scenario prose? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases, §FR-010]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is “all detected blocking reasons” defined with clear boundaries for what counts as detectable within one request evaluation window? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK007 Is “remaining-seat information” defined precisely enough to avoid interpretation differences (for example, exact fields or representation rules)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK008 Is “next action guidance” for holds specified with objective content expectations rather than broad wording? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the retry instruction for system errors specified with clear user-facing expectations (timing, channel, or action detail)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK010 Are “near-real-time” fee communication expectations quantified consistently with success criteria thresholds? [Ambiguity, Spec §Assumptions, §SC-004]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Do no-waitlist constraints remain consistent across functional requirements, assumptions, and out-of-scope statements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-014, §Assumptions, §Out of Scope]
- [ ] CHK012 Do student-only scope constraints remain consistent between clarifications, functional requirements, and out-of-scope definitions? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, §FR-015, §Out of Scope]
- [ ] CHK013 Are atomicity requirements and recovery expectations aligned so that “no partial update” behavior is stated without contradiction? [Consistency, Spec §FR-009, §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK014 Are success-criteria targets aligned with functional requirement wording for blocked reasons and fee-change communication outcomes? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, §FR-013, §SC-002, §SC-004]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Can each functional requirement be objectively validated from stated acceptance scenarios, or are any FRs missing direct acceptance linkage? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing, §FR-001..§FR-015]
- [ ] CHK016 Are measurable outcomes free of undefined terms (for example, “complete enrollment”) that could prevent objective pass/fail interpretation? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK017 Is the 30-second enrollment outcome metric clearly bounded by start/end events in requirement language, not only narrative text? [Clarity, Spec §SC-001]

## Scenario And Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK018 Are recovery requirements complete for all failure classes (business-rule blocks vs system errors) with explicit state-preservation expectations? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004..§FR-010]
- [ ] CHK019 Are alternate/exception scenarios for concurrent seat changes and duplicate submissions specified as enforceable requirements, not just edge-case notes? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK020 Is expected behavior for partial fee-assessment unavailability fully specified, including message content minimums and eventual consistency expectations? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, §FR-008]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK021 Are accessibility requirements for enrollment outcomes and blocking-reason comprehension explicitly specified or intentionally excluded? [Gap, Spec §Non-Functional]
- [ ] CHK022 Are security/privacy requirements for hold details and academic-history-derived eligibility messages explicitly defined? [Gap, Spec §Dependencies, §FR-002, §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK023 Are scalability and load-condition requirements defined for peak registration windows beyond summary-level plan assumptions? [Gap, Plan §Technical Context]

## Dependencies And Assumptions

- [ ] CHK024 Are data freshness/latency assumptions for seat counts, holds, and prerequisites quantified to prevent conflicting interpretations? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, §Dependencies]
- [ ] CHK025 Are external dependency failure requirements defined (for unavailable student history, hold service, or fee rule data) with clear fallback expectations? [Gap, Spec §Dependencies]

## Ambiguities And Conflicts

- [ ] CHK026 Is there an explicit rule for ordering/prioritizing displayed blocking reasons to avoid inconsistent user messaging across channels? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK027 Are traceability requirements to UC-17 and UC-17-AS defined with a concrete maintenance mechanism (IDs, mapping location, ownership)? [Traceability, Spec §FR-011, Plan §Constitution Check]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline.
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference.
